description: Hive and Daisy attack the club, finding Radcliffe. Hive uses his sway to force Alisha to take Radcliffe prisoner, while Daisy uses her abilities to viciously subdue Fitz, threatening him with her new alignment and warning about a vision of someone's death. At the same time, Mack enters and begins a fight with James, demonstrating James's new powers.
location: Bucharest transhumanist club (black-market for cybernetics / Radcliffe contact)

transcript.line: It's a thing. This is why Talbot's been so bent out of shape.
